Rows.IDAComment: mode/sub-op byte (0=drop pick-up, 1=quest record, 2=cash item expire, 3=inc EXP, 4=inc SP, 5=inc fame/POP, 6=inc meso, 7=inc GP, 8=give buff, 9=general item expire, 10=system message, 11=quest record ex, 12=item protect expire, 13=item expire replace, 14=skill expire)

Rows.Note: atlas: trailing padding byte — client stops reading (harmless over-write)
